<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net"> <diagram name="페이지-1" id="_TDrWyxFsVw7v6vOd-ME"> <mxGraphModel dx="1538" dy="987" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="nxC9Op3ydU4WIOhHS_1r-83" parent="1" style="shape=mxgraph.flowchart.document;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="채용공고" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="120" x="330" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nxC9Op3ydU4WIOhHS_1r-84" parent="1" style="shape=mxgraph.flowchart.document;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="이력서 (PDF/DOCX)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="120" x="530" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nxC9Op3ydU4WIOhHS_1r-85" parent="1" style="swimlane;horizontal=0;startSize=40;fillColor=#f5f5f5;fontStyle=1;html=1;labelPosition=center;verticalLabelPosition=middle;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="<p>Stage 1: 의미론적 검색</p>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="400" x="290" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nxC9Op3ydU4WIOhHS_1r-86" parent="nxC9Op3ydU4WIOhHS_1r-85" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="데이터 파싱" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="120" x="60" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nxC9Op3ydU4WIOhHS_1r-87" parent="nxC9Op3ydU4WIOhHS_1r-85" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="BGE-M3 임베딩" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="120" x="60" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nxC9Op3ydU4WIOhHS_1r-88" parent="nxC9Op3ydU4WIOhHS_1r-85" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="ChromaDB
(코사인 유사도 검색)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="120" x="240" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nxC9Op3ydU4WIOhHS_1r-89" parent="1" style="swimlane;horizontal=0;startSize=40;fillColor=#e8f4f8;fontStyle=1;html=1;" value="Stage 2: 정밀 재정렬" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="140" width="400" x="290" y="640" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nxC9Op3ydU4WIOhHS_1r-90" parent="nxC9Op3ydU4WIOhHS_1r-89" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="상위 50명 후보자" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="120" x="60" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nxC9Op3ydU4WIOhHS_1r-91" parent="nxC9Op3ydU4WIOhHS_1r-89" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="Jina Reranker API
(Cross-encoder)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="120" x="240" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nxC9Op3ydU4WIOhHS_1r-100" edge="1" parent="nxC9Op3ydU4WIOhHS_1r-89" source="nxC9Op3ydU4WIOhHS_1r-88" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;rounded=1;exitX=0.525;exitY=0.985;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;exitPerimeter=0;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="303" y="-20" /> <mxPoint x="124" y="-20" /> </Array> <mxPoint x="244" y="-100" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="124" y="40" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nxC9Op3ydU4WIOhHS_1r-92" parent="1" style="swimlane;horizontal=0;startSize=40;fillColor=#fff0e6;fontStyle=1;html=1;" value="Stage 3: LLM 심층 분석" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="140" width="400" x="290" y="820" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nxC9Op3ydU4WIOhHS_1r-93" parent="nxC9Op3ydU4WIOhHS_1r-92" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="상위 10명 후보자" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="120" x="60" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nxC9Op3ydU4WIOhHS_1r-94" parent="nxC9Op3ydU4WIOhHS_1r-92" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="Gemini AI 분석
